title: Mangrove SMP Season 3: Modded.
description: This is a Modpack for the Mangrove SMP Season 3 free to join java minecraft server. This Modpack includes several performance and graphical mods as well as voice chat and Arcanus (a mod about wizardry). Have fun playing Mangrove SMP Season 3: Modded.
body:
This is the Modpack for the Mangrove SMP Season 3. This Modpack includes several performance and graphical mods like sodium and iris, there is also a custom title screen, as well as gameplay mods like voice chat, Netherite Extras, and Arcanus: Legacy.(A mod about MAGIC) New mods will be added frequently until the server is fully over. Feel free to add whatever client side mods you want as long as they apply to the rules. Have fun playing Mangrove SMP Season 3: Modded.
## SET GUI ACCORDING TO RESOLUTION
- 1920x1080 = GUI SCALE 3
- 2560x1440 = GUI SCALE 4
- 3840x2160 = GUI SCALE 6
